churches.name: Ephesus
churches.description: Return to your first love — the foundation of all spiritual work.

churches.name: Smyrna
churches.description: Be faithful, even unto death, and receive the crown of life.

churches.name: Pergamum
churches.description: Hold fast to the name, and receive the hidden manna and white stone.

churches.name: Thyatira
churches.description: The one who overcomes will receive power over the nations.

churches.name: Sardis
churches.description: Wake up. Strengthen what remains. The faithful will walk in white.

churches.name: Philadelphia
churches.description: An open door no one can shut. A pillar in the temple of God.

churches.name: Laodicea
churches.description: Be either hot or cold. The overcomer will sit with the Lamb on his throne.
